2026-03-13TCFederal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board ActReappointment of the Vice-Chairperson of the Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment BoardReappointment of Amélie L. Lavictoire of Ottawa, Ontario, as Vice-Chairperson of the Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board, to hold office during good behavior for a term of five years, effective July 5, 2026.N/A
act: Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board Act
subject: Reappointment of the Vice-Chairperson of the Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board
precis: Reappointment of Amélie L. Lavictoire of Ottawa, Ontario, as Vice-Chairperson of the Federal Public Sector Labour Relations and Employment Board, to hold office during good behavior for a term of five years, effective July 5, 2026.
